title: 100% Cellulose-Based Packaging: A Scalable Route Beyond Fossil Plastic Films
description: A Finnish cellulose-based film and coating platform could help packaging producers replace fossil plastic while supporting recyclability, biodegradation and EU compliance. title: Ancient DNA from the ocean floor shows what might happen when Arctic sea ice disappears
description: Ocean DNA records show that melting sea ice reshaped marine ecosystems gradually, offering clues to the Arctic's future.

title: These young firefighters are learning ancient Indigenous practices to save Oregon’s forests from wildfire
description: Catalina Solorsano, a Klamath Falls mother of two, has crisscrossed southern Oregon and Northern California working in the heat and rain to lessen the risk of megafires.
